# AppClipAppStoreReviewDetailCreateRequest.Data.Relationships

**Object**

The relationships to other resources that you can set with this request.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipAppStoreReviewDetailCreateRequest.Data.Relationships
```

## Objects

- **AppClipAppStoreReviewDetailCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClipDefaultExperience**: The relationship to the Default App Clip Experiences resource you set with the request that creates an App Clip App Store Review Details resource.

## Objects

- **AppClipAppStoreReviewDetailCreateRequest.Data.Attributes**: The attributes you set that describe the new App Clip App Store Review Details resource.
